fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema_config

fields.description: Filesystem path for the source input or sink output, resolved relative to the run data directory.
fields.label: Path
fields.name: path

fields.description: Sink name for non-conformant rows, or 'discard' for explicit drop
fields.label: On Validation Failure
fields.name: on_validation_failure

fields.description: Input JSON format. When omitted, the source auto-detects JSONL from a .jsonl filename and JSON otherwise.
fields.label: Format
fields.name: format

fields.description: Optional top-level object key containing the array of records to read from a JSON document.
fields.label: Data Key
fields.name: data_key

fields.description: Text encoding used to decode the JSON or JSONL file.
fields.label: Encoding
fields.name: encoding

fields.description: Optional mapping from observed JSON object keys to normalized pipeline field names.
fields.label: Field Mapping
fields.name: field_mapping
